```{=html}
<div style="width:80%;margin:0 auto;text-align:left;">

 <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.65em;">

  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1.1em;background:rgba(157,154,224,0.08);border-left:5px solid #9D9AE0;border-radius:0 12px 12px 0;padding:0.8em 1.1em;">
   <div style="width:1.9em;height:1.9em;border-radius:0.5em;background:rgba(157,154,224,0.16);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#9D9AE0;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="file-text" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:2;"></i></div>
   <div style="flex:1;">
    <div style="font-size:0.68em;font-weight:700;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.2;">Start minimal</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.3em;">One <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#9D9AE0;">SKILL.md</code> is enough to begin.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1.1em;background:rgba(93,212,188,0.08);border-left:5px solid #5DD4BC;border-radius:0 12px 12px 0;padding:0.8em 1.1em;">
   <div style="width:1.9em;height:1.9em;border-radius:0.5em;background:rgba(93,212,188,0.16);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5DD4BC;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="anchor" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:2;"></i></div>
   <div style="flex:1;">
    <div style="font-size:0.68em;font-weight:700;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.2;">Pin the deterministic parts</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.3em;">Templates and scripts keep what must hold still.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1.1em;background:rgba(255,184,77,0.08);border-left:5px solid #FFB84D;border-radius:0 12px 12px 0;padding:0.8em 1.1em;">
   <div style="width:1.9em;height:1.9em;border-radius:0.5em;background:rgba(255,184,77,0.16);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#FFB84D;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="layers" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:2;"></i></div>
   <div style="flex:1;">
    <div style="font-size:0.68em;font-weight:700;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.2;">Bundle workflows</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.3em;">One skill can hold many abilities under one theme.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1.1em;background:rgba(123,181,240,0.08);border-left:5px solid #7BB5F0;border-radius:0 12px 12px 0;padding:0.8em 1.1em;">
   <div style="width:1.9em;height:1.9em;border-radius:0.5em;background:rgba(123,181,240,0.16);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#7BB5F0;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="bot" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:2;"></i></div>
   <div style="flex:1;">
    <div style="font-size:0.68em;font-weight:700;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.2;">Nest other agents</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.3em;">Delegate the task your agent is weak at.</div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
